mapper.sql: u.user_key, u.dept_key, u.position_key, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_name_en, u.user_comment, u.email, u.mobile_tel, u.birth_date, u.use_yn, u.user_type, u.reg_date, u.mod_date, d.dept_name, p.position_title, u.author_cd

reg_user.user_name AS reg_user_name, /* 이름 */ reg_user.user_name_en AS reg_user_name_en, /* 이름 영문명 */ reg_user_position.position_title AS reg_user_position_title, /* 직위명 */ reg_user_dept.dept_name AS reg_user_dept_name, /* 부서명 */

mod_user.user_name AS mod_user_name, /* 이름 */ mod_user.user_name_en AS mod_user_name_en, /* 이름 영문명 */ mod_user_position.position_title AS mod_user_position_title, /* 직위명 */ mod_user_dept.dept_name AS mod_user_dept_name, /* 부서명 */
LEFT JOIN common_dept reg_user_dept ON reg_user.dept_key = reg_user_dept.dept_key LEFT JOIN common_position reg_user_position ON reg_user.position_key = reg_user_position.position_key
LEFT JOIN common_dept mod_user_dept ON mod_user.dept_key = mod_user_dept.dept_key LEFT JOIN common_position mod_user_position ON mod_user.position_key = mod_user_position.position_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_user (user_key, dept_key, position_key, user_id, user_name, user_name_en, user_comment, email, mobile_tel, birth_date, use_yn, user_password, user_type, author_cd, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{userKey}, #{deptKey}, #{positionKey}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userNameEn}, #{userComment}, #{email}, #{mobileTel}, #{birthDate}, #{useYn}, #{userPassword}, #{userType}, #{authorCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
